title: Observability, Capacity, Flow Control, Alarms, and SLOs · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A messaging pairing room predicts publisher, exchange, queue, consumer, ownership, and failure transitions before assembling the first messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board for observability, capacity, flow control, alarms, and slos. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links.
Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together.
Model arrival rate, service rate, concurrency, oldest age, burst, retry amplification, byte volume, and recovery time for capacity decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Message Flow Telemetry
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop messaging team handles case 2834 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine backlog state, oldest age, SLO, and resource alarms into bounded operations action; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then change one routing segment and prove the exact destination set. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Message Flow Telemetry.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Message Flow Telemetry, keep Message Flow Telemetry connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop messaging team handles case 4735 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine backlog state, oldest age, SLO, and resource alarms into bounded operations action; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity SLOs with symptom and cause alerts.

One precondition fails while output still looks plausible. What is the correct response?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Workshop Messaging Slo Alert.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity slos with symptom and cause alerts. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Workshop Messaging Slo Alert, keep Messaging Slo Alert connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

options.text: Keep the plausible Messaging Slo Alert output and hide the violated messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board assumption instead of explaining the failure. That claim fails the test an acceptance boundary evidence boundary for Messaging Slo Alert.

For test an acceptance boundary, apply Messaging Slo Alert without its stated preconditions, omit the messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Messaging Slo Alert for messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board.
